mapper.sql: ls.day_of_week AS dayOfWeek, ls.start_period AS startPeriod, ls.end_period AS endPeriod, lr.building, lr.room AS room
LEFT JOIN lecture_schedule ls ON l.lecture_id = ls.lecture_id LEFT JOIN classroom lr ON ls.room_id = lr.room_id
mapper.select:
SELECT l.lecture_id AS lectureId, l.member_code AS memberCode, l.status, l.lecture_type AS lectureType, l.lecture_name AS lectureName, mj.name AS majorName, pc.name AS proName, l.credit, l.academic_year AS academicYear, l.year, l.semester, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lecture WHERE is_del = false AND status = #{status} ) AS totalCount,
FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT l.lecture_id FROM lecture l WHERE l.is_del = false AND l.status = #{status}
AND l.lecture_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{lectureName}, '%')
ORDER BY l.lecture_id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{startIdx} ) paged JOIN lecture l ON l.lecture_id = paged.lecture_id LEFT JOIN professor_cache pc ON l.member_code = pc.member_code LEFT JOIN major mj ON l.major_id = mj.major_id LEFT JOIN lecture_schedule ls ON l.lecture_id = ls.lecture_id LEFT JOIN classroom lr ON ls.room_id = lr.room_id ORDER BY l.lecture_id DESC

SELECT l.lecture_id AS lectureId, l.lecture_type AS lectureType, l.lecture_name AS lectureName, mj.name AS majorName, pc.name AS proName, l.credit, l.academic_year AS academicYear, l.year, l.semester, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT l2.lecture_id) FROM lecture l2 LEFT JOIN professor_cache pc2 ON l2.member_code = pc2.member_code WHERE l2.status = 'APPROVED' AND pc2.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{proName}, '%') AND l2.lecture_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{lectureName}, '%') AND l2.major_id = #{majorId} AND l2.year = #{year} AND l2.semester = #{semester} ) AS totalCount,
FROM lecture l LEFT JOIN professor_cache pc ON l.member_code = pc.member_code LEFT JOIN major mj ON l.major_id = mj.major_id
WHERE l.status = 'APPROVED'
AND (
l.lecture_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{lectureName}, '%')
OR pc.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{proName}, '%')
)
AND l.major_id = #{majorId} AND l.year = #{year} AND l.semester = #{semester} ORDER BY l.lecture_id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{startIdx}

SELECT l.lecture_id AS lectureId, l.major_id AS majorId, mj.name AS majorName, pc.name AS proName, l.year, l.semester, l.lecture_name AS lectureName, l.credit, l.lecture_type AS lectureType, l.ref_books AS refBooks, l.goal, l.weekly_plan AS weeklyPlan, l.academic_year AS academicYear, l.max_std AS maxStd, l.status, l.start_date AS startDate, l.end_date AS endDate, l.member_code AS memberCode, lrj.reason AS rejectionReason, lrj.created_at AS rejectionAt,
FROM lecture l LEFT JOIN major mj ON l.major_id = mj.major_id LEFT JOIN professor_cache pc ON l.member_code = pc.member_code LEFT JOIN lecture_rejection lrj ON lrj.rejection_id = ( SELECT rejection_id FROM lecture_rejection WHERE lecture_id = l.lecture_id ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1 )
WHERE l.lecture_id = #{lectureId} AND l.is_del = false

SELECT l.lecture_id AS lectureId, l.member_code AS memberCode, l.lecture_name AS lectureName, pc.name AS proName, l.year, l.semester,
FROM lecture l LEFT JOIN professor_cache pc ON l.member_code = pc.member_code
WHERE l.member_code = #{memberCode} AND l.status = 'APPROVED' AND l.is_del = false AND l.year = #{year} AND l.semester = #{semester} ORDER BY l.lecture_id

SELECT l.lecture_id AS lectureId, l.lecture_name AS lectureName, pc.name AS proName, l.year, l.semester,
FROM course c JOIN lecture l ON c.lecture_id = l.lecture_id LEFT JOIN professor_cache pc ON l.member_code = pc.member_code
WHERE c.student_code = #{memberCode} AND l.status = 'APPROVED' AND l.year = #{year} AND l.semester = #{semester} ORDER BY l.lecture_id
